nodes.label: Screenshot: Stage Many Files UI (Dragit)
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Dragit app showing two panels: 'Unstaged Changes' with a badge count of 7 (files listed: README.md at ./, models.ts at ./src/api, branches.ts at ./src/api/queries, app.tsx partially visible) and 'Staged Changes' with a badge count of 0 showing 'No files with staged changes found.' placeholder. A hand/pointer cursor hovers over the unstaged changes count badge, indicating a bulk-stage-all interaction. Dark theme macOS window with traffic-light controls. Demonstrates the feature of staging multiple files at once.
